svg.title: Query Cache Incremental Merge
svg.desc: Comparison diagram. Left: default behavior discards the stale cache entry and rescans the whole partition every hour. Right: incremental merge reuses the stale entry, scans only one hour of delta rowsets, sends cached partial blocks and delta partial blocks side by side to the upstream merge aggregate, and writes the combined blocks back as the v101 entry.
svg.text: hourly load bumps the version to v101
same hourly load, now at version v101
